verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That the sick are to be visited.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Solomon, in Ecclesiasticus: “Be not slack to visit the sick man; for from these things thou shalt be strengthened in love.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Gospel: “I was sick, and ye visited me; I was in prison, and ye came unto me.”
